# Breaking Ground Land Services and Demolition
> Owner-operated mobile home demolition, light structure removal, land clearing, and site work based in Kathleen, Florida.

Contact: (863) 899-9717 | info@breakinggroundlsad.com
Site: https://breakinggroundlsad.com

## Primary services
- Mobile home demolition: https://breakinggroundlsad.com/mobile-home-demolition/
- Demolition: https://breakinggroundlsad.com/demolition/
- Land clearing: https://breakinggroundlsad.com/land-clearing/
- Stump removal: https://breakinggroundlsad.com/stump-removal/

## Notes
- Founded 2024 (not a GC marketing unrestricted building demolition)
- Central Florida core; statewide by scope for larger jobs
